simple_types.name: BUSY_BUSY_Field
simple_types.code:
type BUSY_BUSY_Field is
   Ready,
   Busy)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Ready
enumeration_literals.description: An ADC conversion is taking place. ADC is busy.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_EXTREFSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_EXTREFSEL_Field is
   None,
   Analogreference0,
   Analogreference1)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: None
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog reference 0 as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Analogreference0
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog reference 1 as reference.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_INPSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_INPSEL_Field is
   Analoginputnoprescaling,
   Analoginputtwothirdsprescaling,
   Analoginputonethirdprescaling,
   Supplytwothirdsprescaling,
   Supplyonethirdprescaling)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginputnoprescaling
enumeration_literals.description:
Analog input specified by PSEL with 2/3 prescaling used as input for the
conversion.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginputtwothirdsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description:
Analog input specified by PSEL with 1/3 prescaling used as input for the
conversion.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginputonethirdprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Supply voltage with 2/3 prescaling used as input for the conversion.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplytwothirdsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Supply voltage with 1/3 prescaling used as input for the conversion.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_PSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_PSEL_Field is
   Disabled,
   Analoginput0,
   Analoginput1,
   Analoginput2,
   Analoginput3,
   Analoginput4,
   Analoginput5,
   Analoginput6,
   Analoginput7)
  with Size => 8;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 0 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput0
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 1 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput1
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 2 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput2
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 3 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput3
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 4 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput4
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 5 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput5
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 6 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput6
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 7 as analog input.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_REFSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_REFSEL_Field is
   Vbg,
   External,
   Supplyonehalfprescaling,
   Supplyonethirdprescaling)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Vbg
enumeration_literals.description: Use external source configured by EXTREFSEL as reference for conversion.

enumeration_literals.name: External
enumeration_literals.description:
Use supply voltage with 1/2 prescaling as reference for conversion. Only
usable when supply voltage is between 1.7V and 2.6V.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplyonehalfprescaling
enumeration_literals.description:
Use supply voltage with 1/3 prescaling as reference for conversion. Only
usable when supply voltage is between 2.5V and 3.6V.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_RES_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_RES_Field is
   Val_8BIT,
   Val_9BIT,
   Val_10BIT)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Val_8BIT
enumeration_literals.description: 9bit ADC resolution.

enumeration_literals.name: Val_9BIT
enumeration_literals.description: 10bit ADC resolution.

simple_types.name: ENABLE_ENABLE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ENABLE_ENABLE_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description:
ADC is enabled. If an analog input pin is selected as source of the
conversion, the selected pin is configured as an analog input.

simple_types.name: INTENCLR_END_Field
simple_types.code:
type INTENCLR_END_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Interrupt enabled.

simple_types.name: INTENCLR_END_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type INTENCLR_END_Field_1 is
   Intenclr_End_Field_Reset,
   Clear)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Intenclr_End_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Disable interrupt on write.

simple_types.name: INTENSET_END_Field
simple_types.code:
type INTENSET_END_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Interrupt enabled.

simple_types.name: INTENSET_END_Field_1
simple_types.code:
type INTENSET_END_Field_1 is
   Intenset_End_Field_Reset,
   Set)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Intenset_End_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Enable interrupt on write.

simple_types.name: POWER_POWER_Field
simple_types.code:
type POWER_POWER_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Module power enabled.

record_types.name: ADC_Peripheral
BUSY_Register
CONFIG_Register
ENABLE_Register
INTENCLR_Register
INTENSET_Register
POWER_Register
RESULT_Register

variables.name: ADC_Periph
variables.code:
ADC_Periph : aliased ADC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => ADC_Base;
